title: ASSITANT ACCOUNTS EXECUTIVE
description:
JOB SUMMARY

Provide support in daily accounting operations, including data entry, invoicing, payment processing, and basic reconciliations.

JOB DISCRIPTION

  • Assist in daily accounting tasks including data entry and filing
  • Prepare and process invoices, debit notes, credit notes and payment vouchers
  • Assist with accounts payable and receivable functions
  • Perform basic bank and petty cash reconciliations
  • Support monthly closing activities and reports
  • Maintain proper documentation and records for audit purposes
  • Liaise with internal departments and external vendors on payment matters
  • Prepare sales agreement for existing and new projects
  • Any other ad-hoc duties assigned by the Finance Manager

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Higher NITEC in Accounting or related fields
  • Basic knowledge of accounting principles and Microsoft Excel
  • Meticulous, eager to learn and a team player
  • Only Singaporeans and PR's need to apply
  • Fresh ITE Graduates welcome to apply (no previous work experience required)

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in 2005, ESA Security Pte Ltd was established by Mr Edwin Seah. The company was taken over by a new management on 01st October 2022 as the previous director had retired.

With the new management, ESA Security has and will be undergoing major changes in terms of branding, systems, procedures, processes etc. The company will be forward looking and will anticipate and embrace the numerous changes and challenges faced by the security industry in the near future. This cannot be emphasized much more than through the new meaning of ESA - Empowering Sustainable Ambitions.

ESA has two (2) business divisions and operation managers who both will lead different teams of executives. The only shared resource for operations will be the command centre. ESA currently has a workforce of ninety-five (95) officers and is managing twenty (20) clients. Each operation executive will manage not more than forty-five (45) security officers and or not more than fifteen (15) sites, whichever KPI is hit first. An operation manager will ideally manage up to a maximum of five (5) operations executives. In the event of a pandemic, ESA Security will be well equipped to handle due our intentionally designed organisational structure.


The ESA Difference is our commitment to our customers. We understand that every aspect of each job is vital, from the administrative back office and internal processes down to the hiring of everyone. ESA adopts a culture of teamwork that promotes cohesiveness and ensures that full support is provided for consistent, experienced, and professional delivery always.

Our Vision - To be the leading integral global security service provider and preferred business partner to all our clients.

Our Mission - To revolutionize the security industry through customized security solutions with excellence, reliability, and professionalism.

1. CLIENT-FOCUSED - We maintain close-knit relations with our customers to instill trust, openness, and feedback.

2. QUALITY - We provide value-added service to enhance customer experience and service standards.

3. INTEGRITY - We can be relied on always doing the right thing.

4. TEAMWORK - As the saying goes: The Whole is Greater than the Sum of its Parts.  This echoes the T.E.A.M. acronym—together, everyone achieves more.

5. FAIR SYSTEM - A fair system must be in place to encourage positive behaviour /actions in terms of rewards and to deter negative behaviour /actions in terms of penalties.

6. PROACTIVENESS - Everyone appreciates being updated promptly and automatically, without having the need to constantly chase. With this in mind, Sands Global has put in place procedures such as our 1) New Site Checklist, 2) Allocation of points to be proactive in our appraisal system, 3) Monthly client feedback system to promote proactiveness within its organization.

7. ADAPTABILITY - Thru globalization and ungodly technological advancement in recent years, compounded by the fact that the Security industry in Singapore is undergoing major changes in the face of terrorism and the need to bring the industry standards up. Change is the only constant and being adaptive is the key to surviving and thriving in this industry.
postedCompany.name: ESA SECURITY PTE. LTD.
